'''''DS 5''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] military outpost located in the [[Parmel system/Legends|Parmel system]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]] fled here following the discovery of his defection to the Rebellion.

==History==
Harkov's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Protector (Victory I-class)|''Protector'']], was desperately in need of supplies, and the station's [[Commander/Legends|commander]] called in a large supply convoy to aid Harkov. Imperial forces had already tracked Harkov to ''DS 5'', however, and sent a small raiding team of [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] lead by Imperial [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] ace [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] to destroy the convoy.

A subsequent raid of [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]] was intended to thin out the traitors' own TIE Avenger force; 50% of Harkov's elite TIE Avengers fell to Stele and his team in the attack. Harkov, abandoned the ''Protector'' and went to the station ''DS 5'' itself, while the ''Protector'' entered [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] shortly afterward. This may have been a ploy to get the Imperial task force to follow the ''Protector'' and give Harkov and the ''DS 5'' staff enough time to evacuate. This plan, though, was doomed to failure once Tan Stele noticed that, during the TIE Avenger raid, Harkov's personal [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]], the ''[[Toten]]'', left the ''Protector'' and docked aboard ''DS 5''. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] arrived in the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Garrett (Star Destroyer)|''Garrett'']] in the following engagement, with Stele spearheading the final assault as Harkov and his Rebel allies proceeded to evacuate the facility. In the siege that followed, outpost ''DS 5'' was captured, along with Harkov and the base command staff. Harkov was interrogated by Vader, and then executed by [[Telekinesis/Legends#Force Crush|Force Crush]].
